message:
fix(pijs_workload): use floating-point elapsed division for sub-microsecond precision

Replace the lossy integer-parse-from-string approach for per_call_us_f64
with direct f64 arithmetic from elapsed.as_secs_f64(), and add
per_call_ns_f64 field for nanosecond-resolution reporting needed by
native-rust-preview benchmarks where per-call overhead is <10ns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
